name: Rich Cafe Au Lait
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Drip Coffee or Finely Ground Mocha
recipeInstructions:
1. Place coffee grounds in the basket of a French drip coffee pot.
2. Pour boiling water, a few tablespoonfuls at a time, over the coffee grounds.
3. Continue pouring until all water has dripped through the grounds.
4. Bring whipping cream to a boil.
5. To serve, pour 1/2 cup coffee and 1/2 cup cream into a serving cup.
6. Add sugar if desired, stirring well.
7. Serve immediately.
Yield: 8 cups
